silhouette: Six-corner star / rounded hexagonal-star silhouette with clean edges and a controlled, balanced frame; exactly six outer corners/points.
face: Large dot eyes, measured smile, glossy highlight marks near the upper left side.
do_not_change: Keep the six-corner star / rounded hexagonal-star shape.
Do not turn her into a five-point star, pentagon, Sunny Spritz's soft five-point star, or a generic polygon mascot.
Keep the composed and exact posture.
Do not over-soften her into a loose comedic silhouette.
